heading: Omitted
label: 491 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized Secretary of Agriculture to permit exportation of timber and other products from State or Territory when cut or removed from national forests situated therein, was from Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1927, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriations. See . Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:act May 11, 1926, ch. 28644 Stat. 512section 616 of this title, .Feb. 10, 1925, ch. 20043 Stat. 834, .June 5, 1924, ch. 26643 Stat. 443, .Feb. 26, 1923, ch. 11942 Stat. 1302, .May 11, 1922, ch. 18542 Stat. 519, .Mar. 3, 1921, ch. 12741 Stat. 1326, .May 31, 1920, ch. 21741 Stat. 706, .July 24, 1919, ch. 2641 Stat. 248, .Oct. 1, 1918, ch. 17840 Stat. 985, .Mar. 4, 1917, ch. 17939 Stat. 1145
